title: Tart Almond Crumble
description: A simple yet delicious dessert that combines the crunch of almonds with the sweetness of a tart.
instructions: Roll out the pastry dough on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Transfer the dough to a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
Trim the edges and press the dough into the corners of the pan.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the sliced almonds, granulated sugar, and flour.
Pour the melted butter over the almond mixture and stir until well combined.
Spread the almond mixture evenly over the pastry dough, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Bake the tart for 25-30 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the almonds are fragrant.
Allow the tart to cool completely in the pan before dusting with confectioners' sugar.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
